calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant (Notices)
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:53:19 a.m. and concluding at 10:12:44 a.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C. represented by Mark M. Scott via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Cable Specialists Inc., a South Dakota Corporation DBA Cable Specialists not appearing.

MATTHEW JACOBS, Senior Litigation Paralegal, is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court examines MATTHEW JABCOBS and witness confirms statements made by counsel.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Equipment Financing Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Collectiom Agency Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Ditch Witch Payment History Report
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Letter to Mr. Hoffman dated Mar-17-2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - Invoice

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by witness and Plaintiff's Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., and against Defendant Cable Specialists Inc., a South Dakota Corporation DBA Cable Specialists, as follows:

Damages: $132,062.29
Prejudgment Interest: $2,290.32
Attorney Fees: $1,114.24
Costs: $645.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $136,111.85

Orion is to recover from Defendant Cable Specialists Inc., a South Dakota Corporation DBA Cable Specialists possession of the following personal property: One (1) 2017 Ditch Witch FX30 Vacuum s/n DWPF30XEH0003272; One (1) Ditch Witch Trailer VIN 1DSB122C4H1700906.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
